feed.title: CC-Bench
feed.subtitle: A modular benchmark framework for HPC scenarios, supporting MPI / NCCL / RCCL communication backends with LD_PRELOAD-based instrumentation.

entry.title: CC-Bench v1.0 Released
entry.content:
We are excited to announce the first release of CC-Bench, a modular benchmark framework for high-performance communication and compression evaluation in HPC environments.

This initial release includes:

  • MPI, NCCL, and RCCL communication backend support
  • LD_PRELOAD-based instrumentation wrappers
  • CCL compression plugin integration
  • Background daemon monitoring
  • JSONC-based configuration with auto-generation scripts

Check the Leaderboard for initial benchmark results.
entry.summary: We are excited to announce the first release of CC-Bench, a modular benchmark framework for high-performance communication and compression evaluation in HPC environments.

entry.title: Initial Benchmark Results Published
entry.content:
Initial benchmark results have been published to the leaderboard. The results cover:

  • NCCL AllReduce bandwidth benchmarks (256MB, 512MB, 1GB)
  • MPI AllReduce bandwidth benchmarks (256MB, 512MB, 1GB)
  • NCCL AllGather bandwidth benchmarks
  • CCL-compression throughput results
  • Microbenchmark latency measurements

See the full results on the Leaderboard page.
entry.summary: Initial benchmark results have been published to the leaderboard. The results cover:
